hero.name: Ayman
hero.description: Fullstack Developer crafting clean, fast, and reliable products from React interfaces to Node.js backends and the automations that connect them.

about.description: I am a Fullstack Developer with over 5 years of commercial experience building modern web applications, internal services, automation systems, and Telegram bots and mini apps. I specialize in developing frontend and backend applications using React, Node.js, Express, and modern web technologies. I have experience developing and maintaining internal services, Telegram bots and Telegram Mini Apps, automating business processes, building AI tools based on LLMs, and integrating APIs. I am experienced in full-cycle development, from UI and system architecture design to testing, optimization, and maintaining production-ready solutions. I am looking to further develop my skills in Fullstack development and AI/LLM engineering, system architecture design, process automation, and building AI-powered solutions, creating efficient and scalable digital products.

experience.header1: WHAT I HAVE DONE SO FAR

job1.title: Fullstack Developer
job1.about: Media buying agency specializing in purchasing traffic on social networks.

description.point1: Developing services and mini-applications integrated with Telegram bots and Telegram mini apps.
description.point2: Building and adapting landing pages/pre-landing pages for different devices.
description.point5: Identifying and fixing bugs, optimizing client-side code.

job2.title: Java Developer
job2.about: Specializing in the development of software solutions for businesses, especially in the financial sector. The company's main product is <Remit Flow>, designed for exchange offices and money transfers.

description.point1: Participated in all stages of software development: design, implementation, deployment, and support..
description.point2: Analyzed requirements and contributed to achieving business goals.
description.point3: Developed and maintained Java/Java EE applications with a focus on optimization and scalability.
description.point4: Collaborated with teams to ensure quality and meet deadlines.
description.point5: Coordinated with various departments (analytics, DevOps, support) to ensure smooth system operation and successful solution implementation.
description.point6: Prepared technical documentation and provided user guidance.

job3.title: Technical Support Specialist
job3.about: IT services company. Provides domain registration, hosting, web design and development, and also offers accounting systems and technical support.

description.point1: Troubleshooting and resolving software and hardware issues.
description.point2: Diagnosing and fixing technical problems, including account setup and network configuration.
description.point3: Following up with clients to ensure full functionality of their IT systems after issue resolution.

items.name: Igor
items.quote: Ayman consistently turns vague requirements into working features fast. His Telegram bot automations saved our team hours every week.

items.name: Sara
items.quote: Reliable, detail-oriented, and easy to work with. He communicates trade-offs clearly and always delivers production-ready code.

items.name: Mohanad
items.quote: I had the pleasure of working with Ayman on the development of my website, and I couldn’t be happier with the results. From the very beginning, Ayman demonstrated exceptional professionalism, creativity, and technical expertise. He took the time to understand my vision and needs, ensuring every detail aligned with my goals.
